member.name: T:DualFrontier.AI.BehaviourTree.BTBlackboard
member.summary: A per-pawn key-value store for BT nodes to share state between ticks. Nodes read and write named values here instead of keeping their own fields.

member.name: M:DualFrontier.AI.BehaviourTree.BTBlackboard.Set(System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Sets a value by key. Overwrites if key already exists.
member.param: The key under which the value is set.

member.name: M:DualFrontier.AI.BehaviourTree.BTBlackboard.Get(System.String)
member.summary: Gets a value by key. Returns null if key not found or value is explicitly null.
member.param: The key of the value to retrieve.
member.returns: The stored object, or null if the key does not exist.

member.name: M:DualFrontier.AI.BehaviourTree.BTBlackboard.Get``1(System.String)
member.summary: Gets a typed value from the blackboard by key. Returns default(T) if key not found or wrong type.
member.typeparam: The expected type of the value.
member.param: The key of the value to retrieve.
member.returns: The casted value, or default(T) if the key is not found or the stored value cannot be cast to T.

member.name: M:DualFrontier.AI.BehaviourTree.BTBlackboard.Has(System.String)
member.summary: Returns true if key exists.
member.returns: true if the key is present; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:DualFrontier.AI.BehaviourTree.BTBlackboard.Clear(System.String)
member.summary: Removes a key. No-op if key does not exist.

member.name: M:DualFrontier.AI.BehaviourTree.BTBlackboard.ClearAll
member.summary: Removes all keys. Called on job reassignment.

member.name: T:DualFrontier.AI.BehaviourTree.BTContext
member.summary: Passed to every BTNode.Tick call. Contains the entity being evaluated and its blackboard. Nodes must not store a reference to BTContext between ticks — it may be recreated each tick.

member.name: P:DualFrontier.AI.BehaviourTree.BTContext.PawnId
member.summary: The unique identifier of the entity this Behaviour Tree is currently evaluating.

member.name: P:DualFrontier.AI.BehaviourTree.BTContext.Blackboard
member.summary: Shared state for this pawn's Behaviour Tree across ticks.

member.name: M:DualFrontier.AI.BehaviourTree.BTContext.#ctor(DualFrontier.Contracts.Core.EntityId,DualFrontier.AI.BehaviourTree.BTBlackboard)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The unique ID of the pawn.
The shared blackboard for this pawn's state.

member.name: T:DualFrontier.AI.BehaviourTree.BTStatus
member.summary: Результат одного тика ноды behaviour tree.

member.name: F:DualFrontier.AI.BehaviourTree.BTStatus.Running
member.summary: Нода ещё работает — вернуться на следующем тике.

member.name: F:DualFrontier.AI.BehaviourTree.BTStatus.Success
member.summary: Нода выполнилась успешно.

member.name: F:DualFrontier.AI.BehaviourTree.BTStatus.Failure
member.summary: Нода не смогла выполниться.

member.name: T:DualFrontier.AI.BehaviourTree.BTNode
member.summary:
Базовый класс ноды behaviour tree. Все композиты (Selector, Sequence) и листья (Leaf) наследуются от него.
Тикается синхронно из AI-слоя (см. GDD раздел "AI пешек").

member.name: M:DualFrontier.AI.BehaviourTree.BTNode.Tick(DualFrontier.AI.BehaviourTree.BTContext)
member.summary: Прогон одного шага ноды. Чистая функция по контексту — никаких глобальных обращений к миру.

member.name: T:DualFrontier.AI.BehaviourTree.Leaf
member.summary:
Базовый класс листа behaviour tree: конкретное действие (идти к точке, съесть еду) или условие (голоден ли пешка?).
Листья НЕ вызывают друг друга — композиция идёт через и .

member.name: T:DualFrontier.AI.BehaviourTree.Leaves.IdleLeaf
member.summary: Action leaf: always returns Success. Used as fallback in Selector.

member.name: T:DualFrontier.AI.BehaviourTree.Leaves.IsExhaustedLeaf
member.summary:
Condition leaf: returns Success if pawn is exhausted, Failure otherwise.
TODO(Phase 4): the blackboard key "Rest" is not yet populated by any producer — see note on for the broader gap.

member.name: T:DualFrontier.AI.BehaviourTree.Leaves.IsHungryLeaf
member.summary:
Condition leaf: returns Success if pawn is hungry, Failure otherwise.
TODO(Phase 4): the blackboard key "Hunger" is not yet populated by any producer — Phase 3 JobSystem uses inline priority logic and does not tick a behaviour tree. Until a BT-runner system seeds the blackboard from NeedsComponent before each tree tick, this leaf reads default(float) and always returns Failure.

member.name: T:DualFrontier.AI.BehaviourTree.Selector
member.summary:
Композит "ИЛИ": пробует детей по порядку, возвращает первый Success / Running. Возвращает Failure, только если все дети вернули Failure.
Используется для fallback-поведения: "попытайся поесть, иначе поспи, иначе простаивай".

member.name: M:DualFrontier.AI.BehaviourTree.Selector.#ctor(DualFrontier.AI.BehaviourTree.BTNode[])
member.summary: Создаёт селектор из упорядоченного списка детей.

member.name: T:DualFrontier.AI.BehaviourTree.Sequence
member.summary:
Композит "И": выполняет детей по порядку, пока все не вернут Success. Если любой вернул Failure — возвращает Failure. Если ребёнок Running — возвращает Running.
Используется для последовательных планов: "подойти к складу, взять предмет, отнести на стройку".

member.name: M:DualFrontier.AI.BehaviourTree.Sequence.#ctor(DualFrontier.AI.BehaviourTree.BTNode[])
member.summary: Создаёт последовательность из упорядоченного списка детей.

member.name: T:DualFrontier.AI.Jobs.JobStatus
member.summary: Defines the execution status of a job.

member.name: F:DualFrontier.AI.Jobs.JobStatus.Running
member.summary: Job is still executing — call Tick again next frame.

member.name: F:DualFrontier.AI.Jobs.JobStatus.Done
member.summary: Job completed successfully.

member.name: F:DualFrontier.AI.Jobs.JobStatus.Failed
member.summary: Job failed and cannot continue.

member.name: F:DualFrontier.AI.Jobs.JobStatus.Aborted
member.summary: Job was aborted by external request.

member.name: T:DualFrontier.AI.Jobs.IJob
member.summary: Defines the contract for an AI Job executed by a pawn.

member.name: P:DualFrontier.AI.Jobs.IJob.PawnId
member.summary: Unique identifier of the pawn executing this job.

member.name: P:DualFrontier.AI.Jobs.IJob.Status
member.summary: Current execution status.

member.name: M:DualFrontier.AI.Jobs.IJob.Start
member.summary: Initialises the job. Called once before the first Tick.

member.name: M:DualFrontier.AI.Jobs.IJob.Tick(System.Single)
member.summary: Advances the job by one step. Returns current status.

member.name: M:DualFrontier.AI.Jobs.IJob.Abort
member.summary: Aborts the job, rolling back any reserved resources. After Abort, Status must be Aborted.

member.name: T:DualFrontier.AI.Jobs.JobCast
member.summary:
Джоб каста заклинания: подойти на дистанцию → начать каст → дождаться окончания каст-тайма → публикация события в Magic шину через SpellSystem.
См. GDD "Магия", "Школы магии".

member.name: P:DualFrontier.AI.Jobs.JobCast.PawnId
member.summary: Pawn executing this job.

member.name: P:DualFrontier.AI.Jobs.JobCast.Status
member.summary: Current execution status.

member.name: T:DualFrontier.AI.Jobs.JobCraft
member.summary: Job for crafting an item at a workbench. Phase 4 implementation.

member.name: P:DualFrontier.AI.Jobs.JobCraft.PawnId
member.summary: Pawn executing this job.

member.name: P:DualFrontier.AI.Jobs.JobCraft.Status
member.summary: Current execution status.

member.name: T:DualFrontier.AI.Jobs.JobGolemCommand
member.summary: Issues a command to a golem. Phase 4 implementation.

member.name: P:DualFrontier.AI.Jobs.JobGolemCommand.PawnId
member.summary: Pawn executing this job.

member.name: P:DualFrontier.AI.Jobs.JobGolemCommand.Status
member.summary: Current execution status.

member.name: T:DualFrontier.AI.Jobs.JobHaul
member.summary: Carries an item from source to destination. Phase 3 implementation.

member.name: P:DualFrontier.AI.Jobs.JobHaul.PawnId
member.summary: Pawn executing this job.

member.name: P:DualFrontier.AI.Jobs.JobHaul.Status
member.summary: Current execution status.

members.member: A pawn meditates in place for a fixed duration, gaining ether growth. No movement required — pawn must already be at the meditation spot. JobSystem reads MeditationTicksCompleted to apply ether gain on Done.

member.name: P:DualFrontier.AI.Jobs.JobMeditate.MeditationTicksCompleted
member.summary: Read by JobSystem after completion.

member.name: M:DualFrontier.AI.Jobs.JobMeditate.#ctor(DualFrontier.Contracts.Core.EntityId,System.Int32)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the JobMeditate class.
member.param: The ID of the pawn performing the job.
The number of ticks to meditate for (default is 120).

member.name: T:DualFrontier.AI.Pathfinding.IPathfindingService
member.summary:
Сервис поиска пути A* по сетке проходимости.
Синхронный метод — async в системах запрещён, ломает ThreadLocal сторожа изоляции.

member.name: M:DualFrontier.AI.Pathfinding.IPathfindingService.TryFindPath(DualFrontier.Contracts.Math.GridVector,DualFrontier.Contracts.Math.GridVector,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{DualFrontier.Contracts.Math.GridVector}@)
member.summary: Попытка найти путь. Возвращает false, если путь не найден или превышен лимит итераций за тик (пешка попробует ещё раз).

member.name: T:DualFrontier.AI.Pathfinding.NavGrid
member.summary: Represents a grid map used for pathfinding and movement cost calculation in the simulation.

member.name: P:DualFrontier.AI.Pathfinding.NavGrid.Width
member.summary: Gets the width (number of tiles) of the navigation grid.

member.name: P:DualFrontier.AI.Pathfinding.NavGrid.Height
member.summary: Gets the height (number of tiles) of the navigation grid.

member.name: M:DualFrontier.AI.Pathfinding.NavGrid.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the NavGrid class.
member.exception: Thrown if width or height is less than or equal to zero.

member.name: M:DualFrontier.AI.Pathfinding.NavGrid.IsInBounds(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Checks if a specific tile coordinate is within the grid boundaries.
member.returns: True if coordinates are in bounds, otherwise false.

member.name: M:DualFrontier.AI.Pathfinding.NavGrid.Index(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Calculates the flat array index corresponding to the given (x, y) coordinates.

member.name: M:DualFrontier.AI.Pathfinding.NavGrid.IsPassable(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Determines if a tile at the specified coordinates is passable.
member.returns: False if out of bounds, or if the tile is marked as impassable.

member.name: M:DualFrontier.AI.Pathfinding.NavGrid.GetCost(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves the movement cost associated with a tile at the specified coordinates.
member.returns: The movement cost (byte). Returns 255 if out of bounds or not passable.

member.name: M:DualFrontier.AI.Pathfinding.NavGrid.SetPassable(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Sets the passability status of a tile at the specified coordinates.
member.remarks: If set to non-passable (false), the movement cost is automatically set to 255. No action is taken if out of bounds.

member.name: M:DualFrontier.AI.Pathfinding.NavGrid.SetCost(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Byte)
member.summary: Sets the movement cost for a tile at the specified coordinates.
member.remarks: No action is taken if out of bounds. The cost update only affects passable tiles.
member.param: The new movement cost (1 = normal, 2 = slow, etc.).
